victim.value: Narrator shot by a woman they had a relationship with
victim.quote: I looked in her eyes and remembered all the time we had spent together and the times we laughed the love the hate then

culprit_and_motive.value: A woman who had a past relationship with the narrator, motive unclear
culprit_and_motive.quote: she pulled the trigger, there was a loud bang, then nothing

social_world.value: Working-class service environment with established hierarchies between staff and customers, boss-employee relationships
social_world.quote: sorry i do that sometimes...Waitress introduction that the boss had drilled into all of us the first day on the job

investigator_wound.value: Narrator traumatized by being shot by someone they trusted and loved, experiencing apparent death/near-death experience
investigator_wound.quote: I looked in her eyes and remembered all the time we had spent together...then, she pulled the trigger

_meta.title: ebook mackenzie herrst every hundred years
